title: How TALMA turns English education into social mobility and a Zionist mission
snippet: At the Jerusalem Post Miami Conference, TALMA CEO Ido Mahatzri showed how teachers, language and values reshape Israel’s periphery.
title_he: How TALMA turns English education into social mobility and a Zionist mission
snippet_he: At the Jerusalem Post Miami Conference, TALMA CEO Ido Mahatzri showed how teachers, language and values reshape Israel’s periphery.

title: 'Over 90% of Iranians hate the regime,' INSS’s Beni Sabti reveals from leaked Iran survey
snippet: “It was a secret poll which said that 92% of the Iranian people hate their regime,” Sabti said, according to a transcript provided to The Jerusalem Post.
title_he: 'Over 90% of Iranians hate the regime,' INSS’s Beni Sabti reveals from leaked Iran survey
snippet_he: “It was a secret poll which said that 92% of the Iranian people hate their regime,” Sabti said, according to a transcript provided to The Jerusalem Post.
